title: Audit Record
description: Defines a single hash-chained audit ledger record as specified by the National MCP-PAI Oncology Trials Standard. Derived from the ledger_server.py AuditRecord dataclass. Each record is linked to its predecessor via SHA-256 hashing for 21 CFR Part 11 compliance.

audit_id.description: Unique identifier for this audit record (UUID v4).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the audited event.

server.description: MCP server that generated the event.

caller.description: Actor identifier. MUST be pseudonymized for patient-related calls.

parameters.description: Tool call parameters. MUST be de-identified where applicable (no raw patient IDs, no PHI).

result_summary.description: Brief outcome description of the tool invocation.

hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest (64 characters) of this record's canonical JSON serialization (alphabetical key order, excluding the hash field itself).

previous_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the preceding audit record. Genesis record uses '0' repeated 64 times.

examples.result_summary: Patient resource retrieved and de-identified successfully
